commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: They did not say, choose, but, show which one to these two you have chosen: knowing that all things were foreordained by God.

commentaries.author: Procopius of Gaza
commentaries.content: A lottery takes place to avoid contention and to assure greater certitude and clarity. The source of this rule is the counsel of God. The apostles imply the idea when they say, Lord, who knowest the hearts Thus it is clear that the lot does not happen by chance but by the power of God.
